title: Personal Ingest Wave 2
notes: Repo-native active wave for the personal-ingest donor family staged under incoming/personal-ingest-wave-2.

Launch verdict is go: AOA-T-0070 two-stage-document-ocr-pipeline and AOA-T-0071 template-backed-field-extraction-after-ocr are now landed, the planting order remains fixed, and the next separate landing PR should start with perceptual-media-dedupe-with-threshold-review.
Three candidates remain staged with seed bundles while telegram-account-auth-and-session-bridge stays as an incubation hold outside the immediate landing lane.
support/registry.json is the authoritative machine-readable queue surface for this wave.
